title: Teng Li
content:
Teng Li
 is a minor antagonist in Renegade Immortal. He is the first 
Foundation Establishment
 Cultivator seen to die in the series and his Foundation was stolen by 
Wang Lin
.

Contents

1

Personality

2

History

2.1

Book Two

3

Links and References

Personality
[
]

He is greedy, as shown by his desire to kill 
Wang Lin
 and steal his treasures, as well as self entitled, because he comes from a powerful clan and believes he can break even their own rules if he gives a convincing excuse.

History
[
]

Book Two
[
]

He was asked by his good friend 
Chen Zhong
 to kill 
Wang Lin
 and 
Zhang Hu
 after the former killed the latter's master, 
Bai Zhan
, who was also Chen Zhong's junior brother under 
Ji Mo
 he waited to ambush Wang Lin at the inn he was staying at and sent his men after Zhang Hu. After a lengthy chase, Wang Lin outwitted him and stole his Foundation, resulting in him dying a horrific death. However, he promised that his grandfather would avenge this act, which resulted in 
Teng Huayuan
 wiping out the 
Wang Clan
 and then going after Wang Lin.
